checkin.journal:
Slept good, it was very tight and I was still sleepy in the morning interesting
Good sleep - no tv, was nicely sleepy before
Packing
Last breakfast in morocco
Flight to London
Finished 3 body problem
Drive to Hotel Mandarin

Walkie in Hyde park
We watched the anatomy of the fall
Overall a good day, we traveled well, no problems. Was a relaxing Sunday.
Inspired by: how nice is hyde Park in spring - no allergy so far not even slightest - interesting I guess nature is not far enough yet
